case_title: CALIFORNIA COMPENSATION INSURANCE CO., vs. BAY AREA INSPECTION SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA COMPENSATION INSURANCE CO.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-08-1993, CONTINUED TO DEC-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA COMPENSATION INSURANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA INSPECTION SERVICES $9,246.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,990.46 INTEREST, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,091.46
